---
name: Create TicketCard
about: Build a reusable TicketCard component and render the ticket list
title: "Create TicketCard"
labels: assessment
---

## Goal

Render each ticket through a reusable `TicketCard` component.

## Requirements

- Create `TicketCard` as a reusable component
- Pass ticket data into the component with props
- Render the list of tickets from the parent
- Include a stable `key` when mapping over tickets

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `TicketCard` exists and is reusable
- [ ] Parent passes ticket data via props
- [ ] All tickets render through `TicketCard`
- [ ] List rendering uses a `key`

## Be ready to explain

- Why this is a component
- What props it receives
- How the parent passes data
- Why keys are required for lists
